INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('     Leading spaces'), ('NoLeadingSpaces'), ('     Mixed spaces   and   text'), ('     Spaces only      '), ('');
SELECT trimLeft(input_string) AS trimmed_string FROM test_strings WHERE length(input_string) > 0;
SELECT DISTINCT trimLeft(input_string) AS unique_trimmed FROM test_strings;
SELECT concat(trimLeft(input_string), ' is now trimmed') FROM test_strings;
SELECT trimLeft(substring(input_string, 1, 10)) FROM test_strings WHERE position(input_string, ' ') > 0;
SELECT trimLeft(input_string) FROM (SELECT input_string FROM test_strings WHERE input_string LIKE '     %') AS subquery;
SELECT a.input_string, trimLeft(a.input_string) AS trimmed_string FROM test_strings AS a JOIN (SELECT 'Sample' AS text) AS b ON position(a.input_string, ' ') > 0;
WITH (SELECT input_string FROM test_strings) AS temp SELECT trimLeft(input_string) FROM temp;
SELECT trimLeft(CASE WHEN input_string = '' THEN 'Default String' ELSE input_string END) FROM test_strings;
